svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(36, 41, 46), rgb(199, 203, 207)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(250, 249, 245), rgb(24, 23, 20));
